title: Add rest api to create agent from xml
issue_text:
One can create jobs from xml via the rest api or from cli. One can also create agents from xml via the cli, but creating an agent via rest from xml is not possible so far.

 * We do not require Jira issues for minor improvements.

 * Major new features should have a Jira issue.
-->

### Testing done
Interactive testing
- Tested that agents can still be created via the UI as before (new and copy from existing)
- posting xml to `/computer/createItem` creates new agent with the name in the xml
- posting xml to `/computer/createItem?name=newName` uses the name from the query parameter
- using illegal characters in the xml of in the query parameter leads to an error

Added unit tests
